_documentation.purpose: Example-only pending patch manifest for the v3.9-alpha2 manifest-validation-only runner. Copy to PATCH_MANIFEST.json only after replacing all placeholder values and setting example_only to false.

guardrails: Example manifest only; do not rename this file to PATCH_MANIFEST.json without replacing placeholders.
Patch runner must validate the manifest before any future patch application stage.
Patch runner must log to handoffs/current/patch-runner.

issues: example_only must be false or absent for a runnable pending manifest.
patch_id must be a non-placeholder string.
patch_title must be a non-placeholder string.
created_utc must be a UTC timestamp like 2026-05-03T18:00:00Z.
status must be pending or ready_for_validation.
bundle.sha256 must be a real 64-character hex SHA256 value.
validation.post_patch_commands must be an array of command strings when present.

blockers: example_only must be false or absent for a runnable pending manifest.
patch_id must be a non-placeholder string.
patch_title must be a non-placeholder string.
created_utc must be a UTC timestamp like 2026-05-03T18:00:00Z.
status must be pending or ready_for_validation.
bundle.sha256 must be a real 64-character hex SHA256 value.
validation.post_patch_commands must be an array of command strings when present.

details.next_action: Fix PATCH_MANIFEST.json validation issues before any future patch-application runner stage.
